series_metadata.series_title: J.A. NORTON'S CORRESP.-ASSOC. OF INDEPENDENT COLLEGES AND UNIVERSITIES OF OHIO
series_metadata.series_description: Chancellor J. A. Norton's correspondence and other materials relating to Association of Independent Colleges and Universities of Ohio (1969-77), American Society for Public Administration (1976-78), Carnegie Commission on Higher Education (1971-76), Constitutional Revision Commission, Corporate 1% Program, Education Deans, and Citizens Task Force.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: In office five years; Records Center three years; then to State Archives., Paper: Archives
